name: Nigel Kennedy
abstract: Nigel Kennedy (born 28 December 1956) is an English  musician and composer. He plays the violin, viola and piano.

concerts.label: The Philadelphia Orchestra
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Violin Concerto in D Major, Op. 61

about_quotes.speaker: Michi Fuji
about_quotes.evidence: But I like Nigel Kennedy. He’s electric. And he’s very masterful of the classic music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michi Fuji interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 3, 2014
